h3781287ag6d15g4e93g8d04ge8b0f32b339f: We'll show the damn rat that poisoned us. Mark my words. Ya don't mess with the Absolute.
hcf4b84d0gce30g43f4gbc24g4a445fe7a819: Fink the Absolute wants me to 'ave another drink.
h251be711g9b13g489bgac7ag13f21f884aca: Hey, can I see yer brand? The priestess gave me one, and I think she did it wrong.
h87ef14abg54d6g4a60ga278ge71d9849e938: Priestess? Is she a healer, too?
hb13a3750g2cd4g4a90gb14fgd6a921b1d103: Heh. Seen 'er carve more folk than she's cured. Still, she's a chosen o' the Absolute now.
h468e214cg1d7dg4d3cg8bf7g37019252be97: Hold on. I was askin' you sumfin', wasn't I?
h91fe9c59ge0ceg47b8g9800g507dad1ef1ad: You wanted to see my brand. Here, take a look.
h76be2c55gf8a0g40edg837eg2d6476ee633d: You wanted to see a brand that I don't have.
hc1de8b56g8676g4e86ga753g72ce1607d3d0: I don't have a brand. Yet.
h0ab400d7g59d2g4ecegb482gef57c2035919: Well, go get one inside, then! But 'ave a drink first. It stings sumfin' proper.
hf2a4da4egeb2fg4554g9767g290e28c403ec: Just like I thought. Yers is prettier 'n mine. S'pose it does the job, though.
h3373fce5g5ee4g4acbga2abg8b84120c18ab: Best see the priestess and get branded, mucker.
h77e548f9g3236g49c7g8522g3ed78eb765a3: You let her burn you? Why?
h5280cd83g5069g46abgb8cegf62e38aa932d: Mark of the Absolute, innit? Shows our devotion to 'er.
h81e9222eg4bcdg4312g9ff0gb013916ad226: Makes it easier to decide who we kill and who we don't, too - so best get a move on, eh?
h3ed4b880g552bg4cb1ga92bgec4a605c089e: Can this priestess heal people too, or does she just brand them?
h9a639252g8c80g49f6ga5c5gc6888dd05a46: Heh. Seen 'er carve more folk than she's cured. Still, she's a chosen o' the Absolute now.
h02df3c16g3261g4961gba85gd52d32223507: See for y'self. Head inside, and follow the sound o' squealin' novices.
h9c542d91gab85g4438g83c6g2edba733c9f6: Hah! Knew I could smell sumfin' roasted. Thought it were just the dwarf.
h02423d06gc6c7g4ee7gb75dg2b21d67a32b6: Grab a drink afore you see the priestess, mucker. The brandin' stings sumfin' proper.
